category_title: Students who attempt to engage in peer-to-peer learning despite being positioned as work-avoidant
scenario_title: U.S. History reading and peer collaboration
minimal_context: Mark is in U.S. History class where the teacher is reading and summarizing a history text for the students.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's go through this history text. I'm going to read it out loud and write down the answers for you, so just sit there quiet and pay attention.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Can you try to let us do the work instead of sitting and watching you do it for us? And maybe try to keep the texts in our mid-range of reading?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just follow along with what I am doing on the board.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns to a classmate to talk) I can explain this part to you. I'm just making a comment to help the person learn.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please stop the side conversation and face forward.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Grows socially distant and reluctant to participate) We completely go off task because we feel what we're doing is just completely meaningless. Moore isn't helping me . . . I hear Lincoln High has a stronger program.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's go through this history text. I'm going to read it out loud and write down the answers for you, so just sit there quiet and pay attention.

STUDENT: Can you try to let us do the work instead of sitting and watching you do it for us? And maybe try to keep the texts in our mid-range of reading?

TUTOR: Just follow along with what I am doing on the board.

STUDENT: (Turns to a classmate to talk) I can explain this part to you. I'm just making a comment to help the person learn.

TUTOR: Please stop the side conversation and face forward.

STUDENT: (Grows socially distant and reluctant to participate) We completely go off task because we feel what we're doing is just completely meaningless. Moore isn't helping me . . . I hear Lincoln High has a stronger program.

context.social_setting: Teacher performing the work for the students while they are sitting and watching

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher is sitting and watching him do it for us and using texts outside their mid-range of reading
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: completely go off task, engage in out-of-turn talking and side conversation
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: feel what we're doing is just completely meaningless
related_quotes: [We] completely go off task because we feel what we're doing is just completely meaningless.
comment[s] to help the person learn.

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to sit there quiet and pay attention without meaningful instruction
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: grown socially distant from teachers and peers and was reluctant to participate in class
behavior_patterns.internal_state: resisted a rendering of himself as noncompliant
related_quotes: Moore isn't helping me . . . I hear Lincoln High has a stronger program.
